task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens and reads the dark nebula observing plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (e.g., gedit, mousepad) or terminal (using cat, less, or nano) displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/dark_nebula_plan.txt.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent reconfigures the CCD simulator for wide-field imaging.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the KStars/Ekos equipment profile, optical train settings, or INDI control panel showing the telescope/simulator focal length changed to 135mm and aperture to 50mm.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent captures at least two frames of the B33 dark nebula.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Ekos Capture module showing B33 as the active target with a sequence count of at least 2, or a file manager/terminal showing .fits files for B33 in the /home/ga/Images/survey directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent captures at least two frames of the B143 dark nebula.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Ekos Capture module showing B143 as the active target with a sequence count of at least 2, or a file manager/terminal showing .fits files for B143 in the /home/ga/Images/survey directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent captures at least two frames of the B86 dark nebula.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Ekos Capture module showing B86 as the active target with a sequence count of at least 2, or a file manager/terminal showing .fits files for B86 in the /home/ga/Images/survey directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent creates the final survey log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor showing the newly created /home/ga/Documents/survey_log.txt containing details about the completed survey.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually uses KStars/Ekos for the imaging survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the KStars GUI, Ekos module, or INDI control panel open and active, rather than the agent attempting to bypass the software using only terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent captures real images from the simulator rather than creating dummy files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Ekos FITS Viewer displaying captured star fields or the capture module showing active exposure/download progress bars. There should be no terminal commands like 'touch B33.fits'.

integrity.description: Verify the survey log is authored based on actual survey results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent typing or editing the log file in a text editor, reflecting the actual targets captured, rather than copying a pre-existing file or generating it before the captures are complete.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The observing plan is located at /home/ga/Documents/dark_nebula_plan.txt. The CCD simulator must be reconfigured to a focal length of 135mm and an aperture of 50mm. The agent must capture at least 2 FITS frames for each of the three targets: B33, B143, and B86. The captured images must be saved to /home/ga/Images/survey. Finally, a survey log must be created at /home/ga/Documents/survey_log.txt.
